ddls:
CREATE TABLE "generators" (
  "generator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generator */,
  "generator_name" TEXT /* Name of the generator */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used for random number generation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the generator */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the generator algorithm */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the generator is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the generator was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the generator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("generator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "generation_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "generator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the generator used for the request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the request */,
  "batch_job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batch job (if applicable) */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value for the random number generation */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value for the random number generation */,
  "specifier" TEXT /* Specifier for handling single value or set of values */,
  "value" REAL /* Single value used for the generation */,
  "set_of_values" TEXT /* Set of values used for the generation */,
  "num_of_numbers" INTEGER /* Number of random numbers to generate */,
  "number_type" TEXT /* Type of numbers (integer, real) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the request was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_generation_requests_batch_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_job_id") REFERENCES batch_jobs ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_generation_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_generation_requests_generator_id FOREIGN KEY ("generator_id") REFERENCES generators ("generator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "generation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the request that generated the result */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the result */,
  "batch_job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batch job (if applicable) */,
  "generated_number" REAL /* Generated random number */,
  "number_type" TEXT /* Type of number generated */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the number was generated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_generation_results_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES generation_requests ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_generation_results_batch_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_job_id") REFERENCES batch_jobs ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_generation_results_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (browser, device) used for access */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, generation request) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the access event occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the request that was changed */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result affected by the change */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the change was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (browser, device) used for the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change occurred */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the audit log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES generation_requests ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES generation_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batch_jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batch job */,
  "generator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the generator used for the job */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the batch job */,
  "num_of_requests" INTEGER /* Number of generation requests in the batch */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the job */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the job */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the job (e.g., running, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the batch job was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the batch job */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batch_jobs_generator_id FOREIGN KEY ("generator_id") REFERENCES generators ("generator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batch_jobs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics data */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the request that generated the analytics */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who requested the analytics */,
  "mean" REAL /* Mean of the generated numbers */,
  "stddev" REAL /* Standard deviation of the generated numbers */,
  "skewness" REAL /* Skewness of the generated numbers */,
  "kurtosis" REAL /* Kurtosis of the generated numbers */,
  "visual_data" TEXT /* Visualization data for the generated numbers */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the analytics data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the analytics data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES generation_requests ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
